info.title: Bull50 API
info.description: India's AI-powered stock market platform — API reference. Generated from the actual zod validation schemas used by each route, not hand-maintained separately. Routes marked 'pending' in their description are scaffolded but not yet functional — see SETUP.md known gaps for details.

bearerAuth.description: Access token from /api/auth/login, /register, or /refresh. 15 min expiry.

accessToken.description: JWT, 15 min expiry. Refresh token is set as an httpOnly cookie.

TopListCategory.description: VOLUME_SHOCKERS, BREAKOUT, and BREAKDOWN are accepted by the schema but not yet computed by the top-lists engine — see Phase 3 known gaps. The other 9 categories are live.

post.description: Rate limited to 10 requests/min per IP. Sets a refresh token as an httpOnly cookie.
Rate limited to 10 requests/min per IP.

post.summary: Rotate refresh token and issue a new access token
post.description: Reads the bull50_rt httpOnly cookie. Rotates the refresh token on every call. If a revoked/expired token is reused, ALL sessions for that user are revoked (theft detection).

post.summary: Log out and revoke the current session

get.summary: Get the current authenticated user
Live snapshot of major NSE indices (Nifty 50, Bank Nifty, India VIX, etc.)
Search instruments by symbol
Live quote for a symbol (LTP, OHLC, volume, OI)
Historical OHLCV candles (daily, or intraday if `interval` is given)
get.description: Omit `interval` for daily candles. Dhan limits intraday requests to a 90-day window per call.

get.summary: Available expiry dates for an underlying
Full option chain for an expiry (raw Dhan response — Greeks, OI, IV per strike)
Derived option chain metrics: PCR, Max Pain, ATM IV, IV Rank/Percentile, OI change
Company profile (live FinEdge pass-through)
get.description: NOT YET FUNCTIONAL — FinEdge endpoint path is a placeholder pending confirmed API docs. Returns an upstream error until wired up.

get.summary: Financial ratios (live FinEdge pass-through)
get.description: NOT YET FUNCTIONAL — FinEdge endpoint path is a placeholder pending confirmed API docs. Returns an upstream error until wired up.

get.summary: Latest stored fundamentals + shareholding for a symbol
get.description: Reads from Bull50's own CompanyFundamentals table — populated via FinEdge (pending) or admin manual entry. Returns 404 until populated.

404.description: No data yet for this symbol

get.summary: Historical fundamentals series for a symbol
Latest market breadth snapshot (advances/declines, new highs/lows)
get.description: Computed by the scheduler every 5 min during market hours. Returns 404 if the scheduler hasn't run yet.

get.summary: Top list for a category (gainers, losers, 52w high/low, etc.)
get.description: 9 of 12 categories are computed (TOP_GAINERS, TOP_LOSERS, MOST_ACTIVE, GAP_UP, GAP_DOWN, UPPER_CIRCUIT, LOWER_CIRCUIT, WEEK_52_HIGH, WEEK_52_LOW). VOLUME_SHOCKERS, BREAKOUT, BREAKDOWN are accepted but return an empty list — see known gaps.

get.summary: Current sector strength ranking (NIFTY sectoral index proxy)
get.description: Returns an empty array with a note until SectorMapping is seeded via the admin endpoints — see known gaps.

get.summary: Sector rotation vs. N hours ago (default 24h)
AI-generated explanation of today's market movement
get.description: Generated by Claude from Bull50's own breadth data (never raw upstream payloads). Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to be configured.

get.summary: AI-generated explanation of option chain positioning
get.description: Generated by Claude from Bull50's own computed option metrics (PCR, Max Pain, IV) — never the raw Dhan payload.

get.summary: Circuit breaker state for DhanHQ and FinEdge
BullMQ job counts for all queues (waiting/active/completed/failed/delayed)
Redis connection status

post.summary: Manually trigger an instrument master sync from Dhan's scrip CSV

get.summary: Recent instrument sync run history
List stored corporate actions, optionally filtered by symbol
get.description: Currently always returns an empty list — no sync worker writes to this table yet (depends on pending FinEdge endpoints).

post.summary: Seed/update a single stock's sectoral index mapping

get.summary: List all current sector mappings

post.summary: Bulk seed/update sector mappings (max 1000 per call)
Manually enter fundamentals for a symbol (bridge until FinEdge endpoints are confirmed)
